fields.helpText: This is the prescription file internal entry number (IEN).
This is the division from the Outpatient Site (file #59).
This is the patient internal entry number (DFN) from the patient file.
This date is entered by the telephone refill process.  It is the date the telephone prescription refill request was processed.
The status of "NOT FILLED" is entered if the telephone refill request  cannot be filled.

fields.setOfCodes: N:NON-RENEWABLE ORDER;U:UNSIGNED ORDERS ARE ALLOWED;I:UNSIGNED ORDERS ARE NOT ALLOWED;
fields.helpText: This field indicates if the prescription is renewable or not renewable.

fields.setOfCodes: 0:PROCESSING PROBLEM;1:PROCESSING OK;2:USER STOPPED;3:NOT PRIMARY CARE PROVIDER;5:PROVIDER TERMINATED;
fields.helpText: '0' FOR PROCESSING PROBLEM;  '1' FOR PROCESSING OK;  '2' FOR USER STOPPED;  '3' FOR NOT PRIMARY CARE PROVIDER;  '5' FOR PROVIDER TERMINATED;    Note: 4 is not currently used.   This field holds various processing result indicators from telephone  refill processing from the RENEW^ORAREN sub routine. It is a set of codes that indicates the telephone renewable status.
This value comes from the AudioCare system when the prescription refill  request is placed.

fields.setOfCodes: A:ANY PROVIDER CAN RENEW;P:ONLY THE PRIMARY CARE CAN RENEW;
fields.helpText: This field is based on a parameter that either only allows the patients primary care provider to renew the prescription, or allows any provider to renew a patient's prescription.
